title: Wahl James Martin ZX595 Mini Grinder, Electric Grinders Ideal for Coffee, Nuts and Spices, Safety Lock-in Lid, Brushed Stainless Steel, 150W, Bullet Design, Corded, Silver, Capacity 70 g
features: POWERFUL & EFFICIENT – Designed with a powerful 150W motor and durable, stainless steel blade to grind dry goods including coffee beans, nuts and spices. Achieve coarse or fine powders as your like in seconds

MULTIPURPOSE - This electric grinder can be used to grind hard and dry foods, such as dried spice, coffee beans, pepper, rock sugar, cinnamon, cumin, bay leaf, dried chili, chickpeas, mint and other relatively dry and crispy materials. The capacity is 70g

SAFETY FEATURE – The grinder can only work when the grinding bowl is locked in place and the lid is correctly placed on the grinding bowl. The base with non-slip rubber feet can achieve stable function
VISIBLE GRINDING CONTROL – Designed with a transparent viewing window that allows you to monitor grinding
ERGONOMIC DESIGN - This bullet shaped grinder has stainless steel housing and is compact with cable tidy to save space
description: From the manufacturer James Martin by Wahl Mini Grinder The James Martin by Wahl Mini Grinder is ideal for grinding dry spices or coffee beans thanks to its powerful 150-watt motor and stainless-steel blade. This electric grinder can be used to grind hard and dry foods, such as dried spice, coffee beans, pepper, rock sugar, cinnamon, cumin, bay leaf, dried chili, chickpeas, mint and other relatively dry and crispy materials. The Mini Grinder is nice and compact and has a stainless-steel inner housing. The lid has been designed with a viewing window that allows you to monitor grinding consistencies. With a total capacity of 70g (10 cup coffee), you can grind plenty of coffee in one go. The safety lock-in system only allows the grinder to work when the lid has been correctly fitted. Designed with cable tidy system for compact and tidy storage.
